name: icon-design
description: Discover, refine, validate, and package production-ready icons and compact brand marks.

interface.shortDescription: Explore, refine, and export original icons.
interface.longDescription: A guided workflow for building an icon brief, exploring numbered directions, refining a selected concept, and exporting production assets.
defaultPrompt: Open the guided icon brief builder.
Refine a numbered icon concept and stop for selection.
